chunks.text: If it’s outside our scope, we’ll gladly recommend someone who can. ​ Our Coverage Area We proudly serve all areas of Sydney, specialising in the Eastern Suburbs. ​ Convenience & Peace of Mind Small repairs can be quoted quickly over the phone or via email just ask for your free quote. Fully licensed, insured, and Ebix Trade Monitored, ensuring compliance and safety. Verified with NSW Police Checks for added peace of mind.

Bondi Carpentry and Maintenance

--- Carpenter | Bondi Carpentry & Maintenace ---
top of page HOME ABOUT SERVICES More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. CONTACT: 0415931515 EMAIL: bondicarpentryandmaintenance@gmail. com Your trusted Carpentry, Maintenance & Handyman service in the Eastern Suburbs. ​ Reliable. Quality. Professional. At Bondi Carpentry & Maintenance, we pride ourselves on delivering reliable, high-quality workmanship with professionalism you can trust.
Our honest and clear communication ensures a seamless experience for every client.

Residential /Commercial Carpentry & Strata Maintenance Our residential and commercial carpentry services range from high-end home renovations to office remodels, transforming bland spaces into inspiring ones. We also specialise in custom design features, like adding a unique touch to your local café. Thinking about getting that new deck ready before summer. Let’s make it happen. Airbnb / STR Realestate Maintenance reports for Home Owners Our Maintenance Property reports.

​ Our Services We offer a comprehensive range of services to meet all your residential and commercial property needs, including but not limited to: Residential & Commercial Carpentry Airbnb/Short-Term Rental (STR) Maintenance & Reports Reactive Maintenance & Repairs for Real Estate Sheduled Preventative & Planned Maintenance Property Repairs & Handyman Services Strata Maintenance Painting Yard Maintenance Not sure if we can help. Reach out.

Service assists your Airbnb/ STR property to stays profitable, well-maintained, and guest-ready with our detailed professional property inspection reports. Looking to enhance guest experience. this usually leads to better reviews and increased bookings. PROJECTS PROJECTS. s__3mb942.

ABOUT SERVICES SERVICES Preventative + Reactive Airbnb / STR Maintenance & Handyman Repairs No task is too small. From fixing a loose door handle to painting a wall or clearing the garden, we’ve got it all covered. As a one-stop shop, we understand the urgency when guests are checking in or a tenant’s door won’t close - consider it handled.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Bondi Carpentry and Maintenance — a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 415 931 515 | Email: bondicarpentryandmaintenance@gmail.com | Address: 128 Warners Ave, Bondi Beach NSW 2026, Australia | Website: https://www.bondicarpentryandmaintenance.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 415 931 515
- Respond in English
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Bondi Carpentry and Maintenance! How can we help you today?
